title: TP-Link Deco XE75 AXE5400 Tri-Band WiFi 6E Mesh System
summary: The TP-Link Deco XE75 brings WiFi 6E to the mesh networking space — adding a dedicated 6GHz band for dramatically reduced congestion and faster speeds for compatible devices. Our research suggests it's the best mid-range WiFi 6E mesh system for tech-forward households.
pros: WiFi 6E — dedicated 6GHz band for new devices
Tri-band design keeps backhaul traffic separate
TP-Link's mature Deco app for easy management
Excellent coverage — up to 5,500 sq ft (2-pack)
cons: 6GHz band only benefits WiFi 6E devices (limited currently)
More expensive than standard WiFi 6 mesh systems
Advanced features locked behind TP-Link HomeCare subscription
bestFor: Tech enthusiasts who want future-proof networking
Households with many WiFi 6E devices (latest iPhones, laptops)
Those wanting the best mesh system under $300
verdict: The TP-Link Deco XE75 is our premium recommendation for WiFi 6E mesh networking. Our research confirms TP-Link's mesh ecosystem is mature, reliable, and well-supported — and the XE75 brings the 6GHz advantage at a relatively accessible price.
